Table of Contents
1.	Get Renewal List	4
2.	Get Renewal Tracking	7
3.	Get Renewal Request Type	9
4.	Submit Request API	10
5.	Renewal Approve	14
6.	Pending Review	16
7.	Grant Authority	17
8.	New Icard Decision	18
9.	Revoke Privileges	19
10.	Revoke Certificate	19

Renewal Request will be a tab under which user can report its lost card, Change of Appearance, FWT
Note:- Currently, “loss_elgible”, will be false for the written below documents, because, we are currently not handling the rejection case. Hence, not allowing the same user having same arc_no  to report loss again. 
While handling the rejection flow, we need to update “loss_elgible”, again to “true”.
Note: Here, “Supporting_document” will be once uploaded by user and shall be available in every row of that specific req_id. DB shall accordingly handle that. 
Note: here ‘transaction’ refers to succesfully callings of api’s and status update
Status after transaction	role which receives the request after transaction	workflow_procedure_id to be used during this transaction	remarks	Unit type
LOST_SUBMITTED	UNIT ADJUTANT	39	Loss submit for Lodger
API: /submitRenewalRequest	Lodger
LOST_APPROVED_UNITADJ	STATION ADJUTANT	40	Loss approval by unit adj
API: /renewalApprove	Lodger
LOST_APPROVED_ADJ	COMMAND HQ	41	Loss approval by station adj
API: /renewalApprove	Lodger
LOST_SUBMITTED	 STATION ADJUTANT	31	Loss submit for Unit
API: /submitRenewalRequest	Unit
LOST_APPROVED_ADJ	COMMAND HQ	32	Loss approval by station adj
API: /renewalApprove	Unit
LOST_APPROVED_CMMND_HQ	APPLICATION OWNER (AIR HQ)	33	API: /renewalApprove	Both
LOST_GRANT_AUTH_AIR_HQ	COMMAND HQ	34	API: /renewalApprove	Both
LOST_GRANT_AUTH_CMMND_HQ	STATION ADJUTANT	35	API: /renewalApprove	Both
LOST_NEW_CARD_REQ_DECIDED	IDR ADJUTANT STAFF	36	API: /renewalApprove	Both
LOST_PRIVILEGES_REVOKED	SUB CA	37	API: /renewalApprove	Both
LOST_CERTIFICATE_REVOKED	NULL	38	API: /revokeCertificate	Both

Fig 1. Workflow Procedures for Loss



1.	Get Renewal List
DB Invocation:
DB shall use tables lost_deface_fwt_history,  “user type tables” (service_personnel_registration, domestic_registration etc to fetch latest rows. DB can use view_request_data table here use arc_no to join rows) fetch data. 
DB shall delete following columns from table “lost_deface_fwt_history”:
sponsor_service_no(add - created_for_service_no), sponsor_name, sponsor_rank, sponsor_unit_code, service_no (add - created_by_service_no ) request_type, applicant_type, workflow_id, recommended_by (add -  recommended_by_service_no), revoked_by (add - revoked_by_service_no), unit_code, card_type (add card_type_id), created_by
DB shall add ‘forwarded_to_role_id’ (int) in lost_deface_fwt_history.
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an “Renewal Workflow” Menu which will have following submenu visible to person with specific role:
•	Pending (Visible to Unit/Station Adjutant) -  it will have 2 tabs ‘Pending Review’(visible to both) and ‘New Card Decision’ (only visible to Station Adjutant).
•	Grant Authority (Command Hq / Air Hq)
•	Revoke Privileges (IDR Adjutant Staff)
•	Revoke Certificate (Sub CA)
UI will call getRenewalList to populate these pages more details listed below.
UIWCMDB
GET API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/db/getRenewalList
Optional filter;-  forwarded_to_role_id, forwarded_from, arc_no,
card_number, created_for_service_no, created_by_service_no, reason_id. user_type, card_type_id, 
status <array>
RESPONSE BODY

	“no_of_request”: 1 // Int

2.	Get Renewal Tracking
DB Invocation:
DB shall use tables lost_deface_fwt_history,  “user type tables” (service_personnel_registration, domestic_registration etc. DB can use view_request_data table here use arc_no to join rows) fetch data. 
DB shall send historical data for that arc_no, card_number
UI Invocation:
UI shall show tracking of loss request in all of the Loss pages with filter as “req_id”.
UIWCMDB
GET API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/db/getRenewalTracking
parameter: req_id, card_number
{
	“no_of_request”: 1 // Int
	“request_list”: [{
		“status”: “” // String
		“forwarded_from”: “” // String

		“forwarded_from_name”: “” // String

		“forwarded_to_role_id”: 1 // Int
		 “forwarded_to_role_name”: “Station Adjutant” // String (DB shall join with roles table to get this value)
		“remarks”: “” // String
		“name_to_be_printed_on_icard”: “” // String,
		“req_id”: “” // String
		“created_at”: StructDateTime
		“created_for_service_no”: “” // String,
“supporting_document”: “” //String

		”arc_no”: “”// String,
		“card_number”: // String, 
}]
3.	Get Renewal Request Type

UI shall call this api to fill “Renewal Type” Dropdown in “Renewal Request” form.

UIWCM
GET API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/db/getRenewalType

WCMDB
GET API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/db/getRenewalType
Optional filter;- created_for_service_no
RESPONSE BODY
DB shall make use of Reason table.
In response body, DB shall return all keys as of “getReason” API.
Now, the “value” of keys will be based on following logic:-
1. DB shall return all those array elements, whose “renewal_eligible” column of “getReason”API is true.
2. Now, over this data, the “enabled” status would be filled as per below criteria:-
DB shall make use of ‘lost_deface_fwt_history’ table and shall check the “loss_eligible” column corresponding to created_for_service_no, reason_id and latest record. If “loss_eligible” is “true”, then “enabled” status shall be “true”. Else, false.
If no record is found in ‘lost_deface_fwt_history’ table, against that specific “created_for_service_no, reason_id”, then also, the “enabled” status shall be “true”.

4.	Submit Request API

UI Invocation:
•	On opening “Renewal Request” Form, GUI shall have a checkbox “I am filling for someone else”. On clicking Which will enable a secondary drop-down filled by personnels (GUI will call getPersonnel populate this dropdown, search enabled). GUI shall send created_for_service_no  from this dropdown. If user doesn’t click the checkbox  created_for_service_no will be service_no received from Ldap.
•	GUI shall have dropdown for “Renewal Type” (GUI shall call getRenewalType to populate this dropdown GUI shall use created_for_service_no as filter).
•	Next GUI shall have User Type Dropdown (filled by getUserType [backlog 2]). based on that user-type  GUI shall call getRequestList  twice, firstly, with filters created_by_service_no and user_type and status CARD_ISSUED.
Secondly with filters created_for_service_no and user_type and status CARD_ISSUED 
both to display “Active Cards” GUI shall segregate these lists by any means deemed appropriate. 
•	“Active Cards”section in GUI, will have table list fetched from above filters with radio-button. “Active Cards” section is mandatory. 
•	Each Details section shall have the clear selection button to clear any mistyped entry.
•	
•	After selecting the personnel and sponsorer, the user will proceed to “Additional Details” section which will vary as per reason_id  from “Renewal Type” dropdown.
o	Lost Card (reason_id 1):
	Complaint No./Fir No.
	Fir Date
	Date of loss
	Upload documents/Fir Documents
	Lost Reason/Remarks.
o	Change of Appearance ( reason_id 2):
	Reason for change
	Upload Documents 
	Remarks
o	FWT ( reason_id 3):
	Damage Description
	Remarks
	Upload Documents
CM Invocation:
•	After the form is filled and submitted by the user CM module shall fill all the workflow relevant data and forward it to DB.
•	CM should take care of the status and card_eligibility_status and “loss_eligible” field.
•	Here, card_eligibility_status is used to refer, when should be a person be allowed to fill its AFIC Registration form (via LOSS/DEFACE/CHANGE under getReason). card_eligibility_status will only be set to ‘ELIGIBLE’ when all the approval workflow is completed in case of LOSS/DEFACE/CHANGE. 
•	Here, “loss_eligible” field referes to, whether the user applying/ submitting/Reporting for Loss/Deface/Change flow should be allowed or not. That is the dropdown part of Loss Page.GUI shall grey out the non-elgible fields.

•	CM shall use workflow_procedure_id  31 for UNIT and 39 for LODGER to fill forwarded_from and forwarded_to_role_id for approval process.

DB Invocation:
•	The Personnel details data will be fetched from the different user registration table in DB (ex: Dependent Details will be fetched from service_personnel_dependent_registration table, contractor details can be fetched from contractor_registration table).
•	Card Number will be fetched from the arc_card_number_map table against the arc_no or the service_no.
•	DB shall update the lost_deface_fwt_history table.
•	DB shall take care of updated_at, created_at

UIWCM
POST API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/cm/submitRenewalRequest
WCMCM

}

5.	Renewal Approve
This api is for approval of renewal request in multiple stages by different authorities. Moving forward UI shall call this all lost stages except last (revoke certificate).
CM Invocation:
•	With ‘workflow_procedure_id’, CM shall verify current_status field in ‘workflow_procedure’ table with ‘status’ field in lost_deface_fwt_history table Then allow 	transaction, else send message as ‘Invalid Transaction (current 	status doesn’t match)’. CM shall set send ‘status’ field to by reading ‘next_status_on_approve’ or ‘next_status_on_reject’ in ‘workflow_procedure’ table based on ‘accepted’ field from request body. If accepted is null treat it as true.
•	If CM receives the is_new_icard_required field as true it shall send card_eligibility_status as ELIGIBLE. If is_new_icard_required field is false, then send card_eligibility_status as NOT_ELIGIBLE 
•	if CM received workflow_procedure_id as 36 (New card decision by Adjutant) then CM shall also call addEarlierLosses (Backlog 2) with whichever data possible and status APPROVED.
DB Invocation:
DB shall only update fields provided in the api else copy from previous row through req_id.
UIWCMCM
POST API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/cm/renewalApprove
REQUEST BODY
“no_of_request”: 1 // Int
“request_list”: [{
	"req_id": “”,	// String
	"arc_no": "ARC12345",   			//String
	"card_number": "878721346576",	//String
	"approver_service_no":"44260-A",	//service no. of the approver
	"accepted":true,	//Boolean
	"recommended_by_service_no": ‘44260-A’,
	is_new_icard_required:  true,
	workflow_procedure_id:  <31-41>, // Int (can refer Fig 1 and indivisual sections)
	"remarks":""		//string
}]
CMDB
POST API: /api/afsac/v1/cm/db/renewalApproveDb
“no_of_request”: 1 // Int
“request_list”: [{
	"status":"",		//choose the applicable status as per approver
	"progress_percent":"",
	"forwarded_from":"",

	 “forwarded_to_role_id”: 1 // Int
	"remarks":"",
	"req_id":"",
	"recommended_by_service_no": ‘44260-A’
	“loss_eligible”: false // Boolean
	is_new_icard_required:  true,
	card_eligibility_status: “” // String (can be null in that case DB shall 	not update this field)
}]
DBCM
Response body (Success)
{
  "timestamp": "2025-11-08 15:40:04",
  "status": "SUCCESS/FAILURE",
  "remarks": "Approved successfully/Cannot be Approved."
}

CMWCMUI
Response body (Success)
{
  "timestamp": "2025-11-08 15:40:04",
  "status": "SUCCESS",
  "remarks": "Request Id [SP2025101020] Approved and forwarded to [44260-A]"
}
Response body (Failure)
{
  "timestamp": "2025-11-08 15:40:04",
  "status": "FAILURE",
  "remarks": " Request Id [SP2025101020] cannot be approved. "
}


6.	Pending Review
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an ‘Pending Review’ tab under ‘Pending’ submenu seen by Station Adjutant, Unit Adjutant and Command HQ. In which it  shall call getRenewalList api with filter forwarded_to_role_id=<role_id from auth> && station_id=<station_id from auth> and status with following logic:
if role_id = 7 (Unit Adjutant) then status =  [LOST_SUBMITTED]
else if role_id = 2 (Station Adjutant) status = [LOST_SUBMITTED, LOST_APPROVED_UNITADJ]
else if role_id = 12 (Command HQ) status = [LOST_APPROVED_ADJ]
to populate table with columns:
created_for_service_no, req_id,arc_no, name_to_be_printed_on_icard, submission date(created_at), user_type, Action
Action column will have ‘view request’ button which shall open the loss request which then shall have approve button clicking which shall call renewalApprove api with workflow_procedure_id as following logic:
•	if unit_type_id is 1 (UNIT) then workflow_procedure_id = 32
•	else if unit_type_id is 2 (LODGER) and role_id = 7 (Unit Adjutant) then workflow_procedure_id = 41
•	else if unit_type_id is 2 (LODGER) and role_id = 2 (Station Adjutant) then workflow_procedure_id = 42
•	else if role_id = 12 (Command HQ) then workflow_procedure_id = 33

7.	Grant Authority
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an ‘Grant Authority’ submenu visible to  Command HQ and Air HQ (Application Owner). In which it  shall call getRenewalList api with filter forwarded_to_role_id=<their role_id> and for status filter use following logic:
if role_id = 11 (Air HQ - Application Owner) then status =  [LOST_APPROVED_CMMND_HQ]
else role_id = 12 (Command HQ) status = [LOST_GRANT_AUTH_AIR_HQ]
columns should be these :
req_id,created_for_service_no, arc_no, name_to_be_printed_on_icard, submission date(created_at), user_type, Action. Action column will have view request button which shall open the loss request which then shall have remarks and ‘grant authority’ button clicking which shall call renewalApprove api with workflow_procedure_id with following logic:
if role_id = 11 (Air HQ - Application Owner) then workflow_procedure_id = 34
else workflow_procedure_id = 35 (Command HQ role_id=12

8.	New Icard Decision 
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an ‘New Icard Decision’ tab under ‘Pending’ submenu visible to Station Adjutant. In which it  shall call getRenewalList api with filter forwarded_to_role_id=<their role_id> and status=[LOST_GRANT_AUTH_CMMND_HQ] to populate table with columns:
req_id, created_for_service_no, arc_no, name_to_be_printed_on_icard, submission date(created_at), user_type, Action
Action column will have ‘view request’ button which shall open the loss request which then shall have remarks and ‘New Card Needed’ and ‘Not Needed’ buttons clicking which shall call renewalApprove api with is_new_icard_required as true/false based on those button and workflow_procedure_id as 36.


9.	Revoke Privileges
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an ‘Revoke Privileges’ submenu visible to IDR Adjutant Staff. In which it  shall call getRenewalList api with filter forwarded_to_role_id=<their role_id> and status=[LOST_NEW_CARD_REQ_DECIDED] to populate table with columns:
req_id,created_for_service_no, arc_no, name_to_be_printed_on_icard, submission date(created_at), user_type, Action
Action column will have ‘view request’ button which shall open the loss request which then shall have remarks and ‘Revoke Privilege’ button clicking which shall call renewalApprove api with workflow_procedure_id as 37.
•	After the station adjutant records his decision whether the new Icard is required or not, request is forwarded to IDR adjutant Staff on success.
•	IDR adjutant can see his pending request and select the card who’s privileges are to be revoked.
•	After selecting the card IDR adjutant Staff will click on the revoke privileges button.
•	A warning prompt shall pop up like do you want to proceed for revocation and take user input to avoid any misclick.

•	IDR Adjutant Staff shall also Generate Lost Card Alert (to all stations). 
•	Moves workflow forward regardless of new I-Card decision
o	Even if new I-card is NOT required, this API is mandatory
•	Personnel can apply for the new I card.



10.	Revoke Certificate
UI Invocation:
UI shall create an ‘Revoke Privileges’ submenu visible to IDR Adjutant Staff. In which it  shall call getRenewalList api with filter forwarded_to_role_id=<their role_id> and status=[LOST_PRIVILEGES_REVOKED] to populate table with columns:
req_id,created_for_service_no, arc_no, name_to_be_printed_on_icard, submission date(created_at), user_type, Action
Action column will have ‘view request’ button which shall open the loss request which then shall have ‘Revoke Privilege’ button clicking which shall call renewalApprove api with is_new_icard_required as true/false based on those button and workflow_procedure_id as 38.
•	After successfully revoking the privileges, request is forwarded to SUB CA for certificate revocation.
•	SUB CA shall revoke the certificates associated with the lost card and updates the CRL by clicking on appropriate button.

DB Invocation:

DB shall update status as received from CM in user_type tables (Ex:-service_personnel_registration) ,registration_request.
DB shal also update updated_at fields.

DB shall only update fields provided in the api else copy from previous row through req_id.
UIWCMCM
POST API: /api/afsac/v1/wcm/cm/revokeCertificate
REQUEST BODY

{
no_of_request: 1, // Integer
request_list: [{
	"req_id": “”,	// String
	“workflow_procedure_id”: // int
	"approver_service_no":"44260-A",	//service no. of the approver
	"remarks":"Certificates revoked and CRL updated"		//string
}]
CMDB
POST API: /api/afsac/v1/cm/db/revokeCertificateDb
no_of_request: 1, // Integer
request_list: [{
	"status":"",
	"progress_percent":"",
	"forwarded_from":"",
	“forwarded_to_role_id”: 1 // Int

	"remarks":"Certificates revoked and CRL updated ",
	"req_id":"",
}]
DBCM
Response body (Success)
{
  "timestamp": "2025-11-08 15:40:04",
  "status": "SUCCESS/FAILURE",
  "remarks": "Decision saved successfully /cannot be saved"
}

  "timestamp": "2025-11-08 15:40:04",
  "status": "SUCCESS",
  "remarks": " Authority granted."
}
Response body (Failure)

  "status": "FAILURE",
  "remarks": "Authority Denied."
}
